item.title: In Denmark, when you turn 30 and are not married, your friends come and throw pepper over you. At the same time, they place a \u201cpebersvend\u201d (a symbolic figure) by your house to show others that you are unmarried. This is me, from today
item.description: In Denmark, when you turn 30 and are not married, your friends come and throw pepper over you. At the same time, they place a \u201cpebersvend\u201d (a symbolic figure) by your house to show others that you are unmarried. This is me, from today

item.title: He apparently stabbed passersby at random, killing a 14-year-old student. Shortly afterward, a brave driver was able to stop the rampaging killer of Villach. When the police arrested him, the 23-year-old Afghan laughed as if nothing had happened.

item.title: In Denmark, when you turn 30 and are not married, your friends come and throw pepper over you. At the same time, they place a \u201cpebersvend\u201d (a symbolic figure) by your house to show others that you are unmarried. This is me, from today
item.description: In Denmark, when you turn 30 and are not married, your friends come and throw pepper over you. At the same time, they place a \u201cpebersvend\u201d (a symbolic figure) by your house to show others that you are unmarried. This is me, from today

item.title: In 2004, Michael O\u2019Leary, CEO of Ryanair, obtained a taxi license for his personal Mercedes-Benz S-Class. This clever decision allowed him to legally drive in Dublin\u2019s bus lanes, avoiding heavy traffic and ensuring a faster commute.
item.description: In 2004, Michael O\u2019Leary, CEO of Ryanair, obtained a taxi license for his personal Mercedes-Benz S-Class. This clever decision allowed him to legally drive in Dublin\u2019s bus lanes, avoiding heavy traffic and ensuring a faster commute.

item.title: In 1978, 15 year old Mary Vincent was raped, had her arms cut off, and was thrown off a 30-foot cliff. Barely alive, she packed her stumps with mud to stop the bleeding, climbed back up, and walked three miles naked to find help.
item.description: In 1978, 15 year old Mary Vincent was raped, had her arms cut off, and was thrown off a 30-foot cliff. Barely alive, she packed her stumps with mud to stop the bleeding, climbed back up, and walked three miles naked to find help.

item.title: In 1978, 15 year old Mary Vincent was raped, had her arms cut off, and was thrown off a 30-foot cliff. Barely alive, she packed her stumps with mud to stop the bleeding, climbed back up, and walked three miles naked to find help.
item.description: In 1978, 15 year old Mary Vincent was raped, had her arms cut off, and was thrown off a 30-foot cliff. Barely alive, she packed her stumps with mud to stop the bleeding, climbed back up, and walked three miles naked to find help.

item.title: The Haja-no-Ontachi is housed at the Isonokami Shrine in Nara. Known as the Demon-Quelling Great Sword, it measures approximately 15 feet (465 cm) in length and weighs 165 pounds (75 kg).
item.description: The Haja-no-Ontachi is housed at the Isonokami Shrine in Nara. Known as the Demon-Quelling Great Sword, it measures approximately 15 feet (465 cm) in length and weighs 165 pounds (75 kg).

item.title: Out of one thousand violent crimes in Norway, only 32 were committed by ethnic Norwegians. We could have had 968 less violent crimes if we had no immigration. This study was done by the Norwegian government itself (SSB).
item.description: Out of one thousand violent crimes in Norway, only 32 were committed by ethnic Norwegians. We could have had 968 less violent crimes if we had no immigration. This study was done by the Norwegian government itself (SSB).
